sourcePage: Visa requirements for Antigua and Barbuda citizens

Argentina.notes: An Electronic Authorization (AVE or ETA) option is available for valid visa holders of the United States..

Australia.notes: May apply online (Online Visitor e600 visa)..

Austria.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Barbados.notes: Holders of Caricom Certificate of Skills can stay indefinitely..

Belarus.notes: Must arrive and depart via Minsk International Airport..

Belgium.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Belize.notes: Holders of Caricom Certificate of Skills can stay indefinitely..

Benin.notes: Must have an international vaccination certificate..

Bhutan.notes: Visa fee is 40 USD per person and visa application may be processed within 5 business days with duration of stay of 90 days.. e-Visa applicant is also subject to pay Sustainable Development Fee.

Bulgaria.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Canada.notes: Citizens of Antigua and Barbuda who have held a Canadian visa in the last 10 years or who hold a valid United States non-immigrant visa can enter Canada solely with an eTA when arriving by air. A visitor visa is still required if arriving by land or sea.

China.notes: Antigua and Barbuda and China sign Agreement of Mutual Visa Exemption on January 25, 2024, according to the agreement, a maximum of not more than 90 days within any 180-day period is allowed..

Colombia.notes: 90 days - extendable up to 180-days stay within a one-year period.

Côte d'Ivoire.notes: eVisa holders must arrive via Port Bouet Airport..

Croatia.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Czech Republic.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Denmark.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Dominica.stay: Freedom of movement for OECS states; ID card valid.

Estonia.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Ethiopia.notes: eVisa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport.

Finland.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

France.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Gabon.notes: Electronic visa holders must arrive via Libreville International Airport..

Germany.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Greece.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Grenada.stay: Freedom of movement for OECS states; ID card valid.

Guyana.notes: Holders of Caricom Certificate of Skills can stay indefinitely..

Hungary.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Iceland.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

India.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via 32 designated airports or 5 designated seaports.. An Indian e-Tourist Visa may only be obtained twice within 1 calendar year.. Foreigners of Pakistani origin or who hold a Pakistani Passport are not eligible for an e-Visa. Foreigners who are not Pakistani nationals, but whose parents or grandparents (either paternal or maternal) were born in, or were permanent residents in Pakistan, are also not eligible for an e-Visa..

Italy.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Jamaica.notes: Holders of Caricom Certificate of Skills can stay indefinitely..

Japan.notes: Eligible for an e-Visa if residing in one these countries Australia, Brazil, Cambodia, Canada, India, Saudi Arabia, Singapore, South Africa, Taiwan (Province of China), United Arab Emirates, United Kingdom, United States.. May apply online.

Kenya.notes: Applications can be submitted up to 90 days prior to travel and must be submitted at least 3 days in advance.. eTA fee is 32.50 USD.. Proof of reservation at the hotel where visitors plan to stay is required (if staying with friends, an invitation letter is also acceptable).. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries..

Kuwait.notes: e-Visa can be obtained for holders of a Residence Permit issued by a GCC member state under the following conditions: To be 18 years old and over.. The residence permit for a GCC state must be valid for at least another 3 months.. To be accompanied by the sponsor of the residence permit if the sponsor is an individual.. Does not apply to holders of a GCC Student Visa and Non-Skilled Worker Visa.

Kyrgyzstan.notes: Electronic visa holders must arrive via Manas International Airport or Osh Airport or through land crossings with China (at Irkeshtam and Torugart ), Kazakhstan (at Ak-jol, Ak-Tilek, Chaldybar, Chon-Kapka ), Tajikistan (at Bor-Dobo, Kulundu, Kyzyl-Bel ) and Uzbekistan (at Dostuk )..

Laos.notes: 18 of the 33 border crossings are only open to regular visa holders.. e-Visa may be used to enter Laos through the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 3 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges, in Boten (road and railroad ), and in Vientiane (at Khamsavath railway station ).. Visa on arrival is available at the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 4 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges and 7 border crossings..

Latvia.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Lebanon.notes: 1 month extendable for 2 additional months. Granted free of charge at Beirut International Airport or any other port of entry if there is no Israeli visa or seal, holding a telephone number, an address in Lebanon, and a non refundable return or circle trip ticket..

Liechtenstein.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Lithuania.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Luxembourg.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Malta.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Mexico.notes: Exempt holders of UK travel documents (blue or black)- holding a valid USA B1/B2 visa, UK C- visitor visa, Canadian visitor visa, Japanese visitor visa or Schengen C-visit visa stamped in a valid passport, provided that the visa is to be issued for multiple entries and continues to be valid during the intended period of stay in Mexico do not require a visa to travel to Mexico as non-lucrative visitors..

Netherlands.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

New Zealand.notes: Holders of an Australian Permanent Resident Visa or Resident Return Visa may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival permitting indefinite stay (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement ), subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure..

Norway.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Pakistan.notes: Online Visa eligible.. Electronic Travel Authorization to obtain a visa on arrival for business purposes..

Poland.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Portugal.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Romania.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Saint Kitts and Nevis.stay: Freedom of movement for OECS states; ID card valid.

Saint Lucia.stay: Freedom of movement for OECS states; ID card valid.

Saint Vincent and the Grenadines.stay: Freedom of movement for OECS states; ID card valid.

Saudi Arabia.notes: Tourist visa on arrival for holders of a valid multiple entry visa from US, UK or Schengen area, under the condition that the multiple entry visa has been used at least once, proving that by showing the entry and exit stamps of the country of issuance..

Slovakia.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Slovenia.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

South Sudan.notes: Obtainable online. Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel.

Spain.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Sri Lanka.notes: The standard visitor visa allows a stay of 60 days within any 6-month period.. Visa fees (for Standard visitor visa): SAARC - USD 35. Non SAARC - USD 75.. e-Visa categories will be charged an additional USD 18.50 service fee.. If transiting from any of the Sri Lankan airports, An e-Visa is exempted (2 day transit period)..

Suriname.notes: Holders of Caricom Certificate of Skills can stay indefinitely..

Sweden.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Switzerland.notes: 3 months during a 6 months period following the date of first entry in the Schengen Area.

Trinidad and Tobago.notes: Holders of Caricom Certificate of Skills can stay indefinitely..

Vietnam.notes: Visa free for 30 days when visiting Phú Quốc.
